rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant methodologically: it develops a brand-level time-varying parameter state-space model estimated with Kalman filtering, and the citing paper likewise builds a brand-level dynamic state-space/Kalman framework with time-varying advertising effectiveness. Given this strong overlap in core modeling approach and constructs (time variation in marketing effects), this is plausibly a substantive theory/method source rather than an incidental mention, even though only one DOI match is provided.
